title: Esho Maa Lakshmi
desc: A tale of Goddess Lakshmi that describes her divine origin, celestial beauty, and role as the bestower of wealth and prosperity in Hindu mythology.

title: Esho Maa Lakshmi
desc: A tale of Goddess Lakshmi that describes her divine origin, celestial beauty, and role as the bestower of wealth and prosperity in Hindu mythology.

title: Shapath Nilam
desc: Sukanta is shattered when his wife, Minu, is raped on their honeymoon. Though his wife fails to recognise him after the incident, her twin sister, Debu, tries to find the culprit.

title: Mangaldeep
desc: Two best friends, Mangal and Deep, embark on a journey to the big city to fulfil their musical dreams. In his quest to see Deep succeed, Mangal risks everything, including his own finances.

title: Sundar Bou
desc: Sabitri, who is married to Nanda, is exploited daily by her mother-in-law. Seeing this, her uncle decides to help her overcome her problems.

title: Sathihara
desc: Musicians Anuradha and Jeet fall in love and marry, but their relationship is tested when Anuradha's thriving career begins to overshadow Jeet's ambitions.

title: Simul Parul
desc: Simul, Rajani's son, falls in love with Parul. However, Parul's father disapproves of their relationship because of his complicated history with Rajani.
